CEDEFECT-USE_CIVILIGHT_CARD_FRAME.title: Enable card frame
Enable card frame recolor for Civilight Eterna
CEDEFECT-USE_CIVILIGHT_ENERGY.title: Enable energy recolor
CEDEFECT-USE_CIVILIGHT_ORBS.title: Enable custom orb
CEDEFECT-USE_CIVILIGHT_MULT_ARM.title: Enable multiplayer arm
CEDEFECT-USE_CIVILIGHT_MULT_ARM.hover.de: Enable custom multiplayer arm (rock/paper/scissor/point) for Civilight Eterna (Defect)
CEDEFECT-USE_CE_COMPAT_MODE.title: Enable compatibility mode
CEDEFECT-USE_CE_COMPAT_MODE.hover.desc: Enable compatibility mode, will disable custom animation. Enable this if the mod broke
CEDEFECT-DEBUG_MODE.title: Enable debug mode
CEDEFECT-DEBUG_MODE.desc: Enable debug mode that will print debug in logs, usually disable to prevent log flooding
